mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_ATTENDANCE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_ATTENDANCE (ID, USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE, USER_ID) VALUES (#{id}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT ID FROM TBL_USER_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

WITH ATTENDANCE AS ( SELECT USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE, MAX(USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE) OVER () AS LAST_ATTENDANCE_DATE, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE DESC ) AS RN FROM TBL_USER_ATTENDANCE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE <= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE LAST_ATTENDANCE_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 1 AND USER_ATTENDANCE_DATE = LAST_ATTENDANCE_DATE - (RN - 1)
